## Outcome

What user or maintainer outcome does this change provide?

## Ownership

Name the affected runtime, Home, Distribution, Extension, Overlay, Target, or delivery boundary.

## Proof

List focused tests, Node versions, provider checks, package checks, and dogfood evidence.

## Effects and limits

State external effects, breaking impact, checkpoints, exclusions, and remaining uncertainty.

## Product alignment

Confirm README, SPEC, schemas, CLI examples, provider projections, and extension assets remain aligned where applicable.
